promptTemplate: An evolving cellular automaton tapestry using {{rule_set}} rules at {{grid_resolution}} resolution. Cells are {{cell_shape}} shaped, colored with a {{color_palette}} palette mapped by {{color_mapping}}. Starting from a {{initial_pattern}} initial pattern, evolving at {{evolution_speed}} speed. Dead cells fade in {{fade_mode}} mode. The grid has {{grid_lines}} grid lines with {{boundary}} boundaries and {{mutation_rate}} mutation rate.
